methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Series A → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.0x) to $16M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Nuclear Energy (found 1 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 8 same-sector peers exist in Nuclear Energy, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

private.name: Fuse Energy
private.rationale: Same sector (Nuclear Energy), same stage (Series A), post-money $200M+

data.narrative:
Curio Solutions is a Series A nuclear energy company founded by Ed McGinnis and Pete Zweifel that has raised $16M+ to date. The valuation analysis draws on a universe of 11 total comparables in the frontier nuclear sector: 3 publicly traded firms (OKLO, NNE, SMR) and 8 private peers including Fuse Energy, TerraPower, X-Energy, Kairos Power, and Oklo.

Stage-progression methodology applies directly here. Using total capital raised ($16M) as a baseline proxy and applying a standard 2.0x step-up multiplier typical for Series A advancement yields $32M. This approach reflects the incremental value creation expected between early and growth-stage rounds in the sector.

Peer-median triangulation is not applicable due to insufficient narrow comparables; while eight same-sector peers exist, fewer than three meet simultaneous filters for stage, adjacency, and valuation tier. Broadening to all-sector medians would introduce excessive noise given nuclear energy's distinctive risk and capital-intensity profile.

The analysis supports a valuation range of $27M (low) to $37M (high), with a median point of $32M. This reflects reliance on a single defensible method. Key uncertainties include technology differentiation versus the identified peer set, regulatory pathway clarity, and burn rate relative to remaining runway on current capital. A fuller peer dataset at this stage would materially strengthen conviction in the range.
